items.title:
I discussed with Oksana Markarova several areas of Ukraine’s priority focus in relations with partners – specifically in economic and investment relations. We are preparing to hold the Ukraine Recovery Conference in June; the event will take place in Gdańsk. And today, at another meeting of our International Advisory Group on Investment Attraction and Economic Development of Ukraine, we discussed the key expectations for the Conference. We value political support from our friends, and it will be stronger if it is followed by concrete, significant flagship projects from the Government of Ukraine. The role of business and Ukraine’s entrepreneurial energy must be decisive here – combining Ukrainian interests with global corporate experience.

Today, together with Oksana, we also coordinated work on the main sectors of our economy that can become real drivers of Ukraine’s economic growth. The key area is the defense technology and innovation sector, the opening of full-scale exports for our capabilities and our security expertise, tested by war. Step by step, we are building the relevant infrastructure – from political agreements at the highest level to concrete cooperation at the business level. We are also preparing economic projects that can be implemented in Ukraine’s regions and provide additional resilience to our communities. Glory to Ukraine!
items.summary: I discussed with Oksana Markarova several areas of Ukraine’s priority focus in relations with partners – specifically in economic and investment relations. items.title: Trump Team Seeks Longer Gas Tax Holiday With Phased-In Return

items.title: Drones targeting Barakah nuclear plant came from Iraqi territory : UAE

Au Salon REuse ce matin, où nous avons tenu un Conseil de planification écologique, j’ai réaffirmé notre cap : la transition écologique est un combat pour notre indépendance, pour notre industrie et nos emplois, pour l’avenir.
                    
Continuer à extraire, produire, jeter : ce modèle nous fragilise. Dépendances industrielles, tensions sur les ressources, chaînes d’approvisionnement sous pression, ses limites sont désormais évidentes.

La réponse est claire : faire du réemploi une priorité. La REuse economy structure cette dynamique à travers le réemploi, la réparation et le reconditionnement. C’est là que se joue une part de notre souveraineté économique et industrielle.

Pour préserver la planète et atteindre nos objectifs climatiques, nous devons poursuivre ce que nous avons engagé depuis huit ans.

Les émissions ont beaucoup baissé depuis 2017, continuons d’avancer sur le plan d’électrification, la lutte contre la pollution plastique, les investissements dans l’économie circulaire, la consigne et la planification territoriale.

Derrière ces choix, il y a une ligne : faire de l’écologie un levier de puissance, au service de notre compétitivité et de notre souveraineté.

We also discussed U.S. efforts at the UN to stop Iran’s unlawful actions in the Strait of Hormuz, and how the U.S. rapidly mobilized resources to support the response to the #Ebola outbreak in the DRC and Uganda.

items.title: Russian leader Vladimir Putin arrives in China just days after Donald Trump’s visit
items.summary:
Russian President Vladimir Putin arrived in Beijing on Tuesday night for a visit aimed at deepening the two sides’ comprehensive partnership, four days after the Chinese capital hosted US President Donald Trump.
This is the Russian leader’s 25th visit to China.
